Cuboid - Class in com.stardevllc.starmclib
This represents a cuboid with a min corner and a max corner in a world
Most of the calculations in this class operate on integers and doubles directly and do not cache any Location objects long term.
This class is set up to be used with the StarSQL library, without depending on it.
Cuboid(String, int, int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class com.stardevllc.starmclib.Cuboid
 
Cuboid(Location, Location) - Constructor for class com.stardevllc.starmclib.Cuboid
 
CURRENT_VERSION - Static variable in enum class com.stardevllc.starmclib.NMSVersion
The current version of the server
CustomColor - Class in com.stardevllc.starmclib.color
This class represents a custom color value
This is created using builder-style methods
You only need to call one of the following CustomColor.awtColor(Color), CustomColor.hexValue(String), CustomColor.rgbValue(int, int, int) or CustomColor.spigotColor(ChatColor).
CustomColor(JavaPlugin) - Constructor for class com.stardevllc.starmclib.color.CustomColor
Constructs a new color

ItemBuilder - Class in com.stardevllc.starmclib.item
A builder for Items
You can use the child classes to customize every type that has an ItemMeta
Note: This uses the XMaterial library to allow multi-version support

Position - Class in com.stardevllc.starmclib
Represents a position without the World aspect, which allows for syncing across servers without requiring worlds
Methods and constructors should be obvious, eventually proper documentation for them will exist
